entry.title: A little US company makes history by landing on the Moon
entry.quote: For the first time in more than half a century, a US-built spacecraft has made a soft landing on the Moon.

entry.title: Google’s Gemini issue is not really about woke/DEI
entry.quote: Everyone who is obsessing over it has failed to notice the much, MUCH bigger problem that it represents: This event is significant because it is major demonstration of someone giving a LLM a set of instructions and the results being totally not at all what they predicted.

entry.title: Apple silicon: 2 Power and thermal glory
Air Canada ordered to pay customer who was misled by airline’s chatbot
entry.quote: Company claimed its chatbot ‘was responsible for its own actions’ when giving wrong information about bereavement fare

entry.title: Review: Modern Man in the Making & Joy and Fear
entry.quote: What is the point today of going back to data from 1939? What is there to be learned from a book describing a “modern” world before the German invasion of Poland, the firebombing of Dresden, the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, the Battle of Stalingrad, the Holocaust, the American use of atomic bombs in Japan, the invention of transistors, and the distribution of antibiotics?
